rationale: The implementation strictly conforms to the frozen scope for v12 Task 1. The `package.json` properly sets the foundation with zero dependencies and explicit ESM/Node version constraints. The `check.mjs` and `test-all.mjs` scripts correctly implement the fail-closed syntax and unlisted-test scans as described in the plan, using synchronous sub-process execution without shell invocation. The diff footprint exactly matches the allowable files (confined to `clotho/` and a single `.gitignore` entry). The deterministic gate validates that all required constraints hold true against the on-disk artifacts.
